self.bands] + return x_bands + + def forward(self, x: torch.Tensor): + x_bands = self.spectrogram(x.squeeze(1)) + fmap = [] + x = [] + + for band, stack in zip(x_bands, self.band_convs): + for i, layer in enumerate(stack): + band = layer(band) + band = torch.nn.functional.leaky_relu(band, 0.1) + if i > 0: + fmap.append(band) + x.append(band) + + x = torch.cat(x, dim=-1) + x = self.conv_post(x) Will apply DC offset removal & peak volume normalization in CQTD!") + + def get_2d_padding( + self, kernel_size: typing.Tuple[int, int], dilation: typing.Tuple[int, int] = (1, 1) + ): + return ( + ((kernel_size[0] - 1) * dilation[0]) // 2, + ((kernel_size[1] - 1) * dilation[1]) // 2, + ) + + def forward(self, x): + fmap = [] + + if self.cqtd_normalize_volume: + # Remove DC offset + x = x -
